Glass-Field.name: Glass-Field
Glass-Field.basicInfo: Desert plain where Wartide magic fused the sand into glass. Walks like ice and breaks like it. The Draklid mark a route across with iron stakes.
Glass-Field.hiddenInfo: Beneath the glass surface, dim shapes can be seen at certain angles of light. Some of the shapes are not stone.

Telinor.name: Telinor
Telinor.basicInfo: The High Forum of the Brotherhood of Wizards, principal seat of the wizard organisations of Hedoria. A walled compound on a rock spur above Shield's End. Maintained at Kelmari expense, governed by Brotherhood rules, not subject to royal authority.
Telinor.hiddenInfo: The Brotherhood's founding grievance is against Avenoria and her line. The senior figures here have been quietly aligned with the Cliffrend war-faction for two generations. They are the institutional pressure for a third soul-war that the Cliffrend court draws on.

The Outer Compound.description: Walled grounds with the apprentice halls, the agoge yards, the libraries, and the lecture-halls. Open to Brotherhood members and authorised guests. Wards on every gate.

The Inner Compound.description: A second walled enclosure within the first, where the senior figures of the Brotherhood meet and the deeper archives are kept. Access by seal only.
